title: Hunor's pack
description: Hunor's pack enhances Minecraft's visuals and ambiance while keeping the vanilla gameplay intact. It improves textures, lighting, and atmosphere, offering a fresh yet familiar experience.
body: Hunor's pack enhances the visual and atmospheric elements of Minecraft while preserving its core **vanilla** gameplay. It focuses on improving textures, lighting, and ambiance to create a more immersive and polished experience, all without altering the game's core mechanics. Perfect for players who want a refined **aesthetic** without losing the **essence** of Minecraft, this pack brings subtle but effective changes to the overall feel of the game.
